qText: From a point A on the ground, the angle of elevation to the top of a building is 30В°. From a point B, which is directly between A and the foot of the building, the angle of elevation is 45В°. What is the ratio of the distance of point A from the building's foot to the distance of point B from the building's foot ?

A person was standing on a road near a mall. He was 1220 m away from the mall and able to see the top of the mall from the road in such a way that the top of a tree, which is in between him and the mall, was exactly in line of sight with the top of the mall. The tree height is 40m and it is 80m away from him. How tall (in m) is the mall?

From a point on a bridge built over a river, the angles of depression to the two opposite banks are 30В° and 45В° respectively. If the width of the river is 80( + 1) metres, find the height of the 3 bridge above the river banks.
An observer on a tower 45 meters high spots a car. The angle of depression to the car is 45В°. What is the distance of the car from the base of the tower?

A man looks at the reflection of the top of the lamp-post on the mirror that is 6.6 m away from the foot of the lamppost. The manвЂ™s height is 1.25 m and he is standing 2 m away from the mirror. Assuming that the mirror is placed on the ground, facing the sky and the man, and that the mirror and the lamp-post are in a same line, find the height of the lamp-post (in metres).
The shadow of a tower standing on level ground is found to be 40 m longer when the Sun's altitude is 30В° than when it was 45В°. Find the height (in meters) of the tower.

Two pillars of equal height stand on either side of a roadway which is 150 m wide. At a point in the road between pillars, the elevations of the pillars are В° рќ‘Ґ 2 3 and В° so that = = , рќ‘¦ рќ‘Ўрќ‘Ћрќ‘›рќ‘Ґ В° 5 , рќ‘Ўрќ‘Ћрќ‘›рќ‘¦ В° 5 then the height of each pillar is :

Subhas, a 3.15 m tall tree, and an 11.25 m tall building are positioned such that their feet on the ground are collinear and the tree is located between Subhas and the building. The tree is located at a distance of 7.5 m from Subhas and at a distance of 45 m from the building. Further, the eyes of Subhas, the top of the tree, and the top of the building fall in one line. Find the height (in m) from the ground at which Subhas' eyes are situated.

From the top of an upright pole 17.75 m high, the angle of elevation of the top of an upright tower was 60В°. If the tower was 57.75 m tall, how far away (in m) from the foot of the pole was the foot of the tower?

A pole 23 m long reaches a window which is 3 m above the 5 ground on one side of a street. Keeping its foot at the same point, the pole is turned to the other side of the street to reach a window 4 m high. What is the 15 width (in m) of the street?

A person was standing on a road near a mall. He was 1215 m away from the mall and able to see the top of the mall from the road in such a way that the top of a tree, which is in between him and the mall, was exactly in line of sight with the top of the mall. The tree height is 20m and it is 60m away from him. How tall (in m) is the mall?

A vertical pole of height H stands on the ground. From point P, the angle of elevation of the top is 45В°. From point Q, 20 meters away from P, the angle of elevation is 30В°. What is the height of the pole ?

A tower stands 60 meters tall. From its peak, the angles of depression to the top and bottom of a nearby building are measured at 45В° and 60В°, respectively. Determine the approximate height of the building as well as the horizontal distance separating the tower from the building.
A flagpole has a shadow measuring 20 meters. Given that the height of the flagpole is 20 meters, 3 What is the angle at which the sun is elevated ?
A steel cable is tied from the top of a vertical flagpole to a point on the ground 20 meters away from its base. If the cable makes an angle of 60В° with the ground, find the length of the cable?
A man standing on the top of a 150 m high tower observes the angles of depression of two cars on the same sides of the tower to be 45В° and 60В°. What is the distance between the two cars?

A vertical tree PQ has its base on the ground Q . From a point A 20 m away from Q, the angle of elevation of P is xВ°. From another point B 60 m away from Q (and in the same line as A), the angle of elevation of P is yВ°. If the height of the tree is 20в€љ3 m, what is the value of xВ° + yВ° ?

A rock climber uses a rope to ascend a cliff. If the vertical height of the cliff is 23 meters and the rope makes an angle of 45В° with the level ground, what is the minimum length of the rope required to reach the top ?
A tower generates a height that is 60 meters long when the sun's angle of elevation is 60 degrees. What is the shadow of the tower ?
An airplane flying at a height of 400 m notices the angles of depression to two boats located on opposite sides as 45В° and 30В°. Find the distance between the two boats.

A statue that is 3.6 meters in height is positioned on top of a pedestal. From a location on the ground, the angle of elevation to the top of the statue measures 60 degrees, while the angle of elevation to the top of the pedestal from the same point is 45 degrees. Determine the height of the pedestal.
A tree is 40 meters tall. What is the length of the shadow cast by the tower when the sun's elevation is 30В° ?
A wheelchair ramp needs to reach a platform that is 2.5 meters high. If the ramp is designed to make an angle of 30В° with the level ground, what is the length of the ramp ?
A ladder reaches a window 9 meters high on a vertical wall. If the ladder is positioned at a 30В° angle to the ground, what is its length ?
A 7-foot person casts a 5-foot shadow. At the same time, a tree casts a 35-foot shadow. How tall is the tree?

A kite is soaring at an altitude of 45 meters above the ground, with its string temporarily secured to a point on the ground. The angle of elevation of the string relative to the ground is 30 degrees. Given that the string remains taut, what is the length of the string ?
A man observes the top of a tower at an angle of elevation of 30В°. He walks 20 meters towards the tower, and the angle of elevation becomes 45В°. What is the height of the tower ?

qText: Two ships positioned on opposite sides of a lighthouse observe the angles of elevation to the top of the lighthouse, which are 30В° and 45В° respectively. Given that the height of the lighthouse is 200 meters, determine the distance between the two ships.
The angles of elevation of the top of a tower from two points on the ground, 400 m apart, and on opposite sides of the tower , are 30В°and 45В°. What is the height of the tower ?

From a point on a bridge built over a river, the angles of depression to the two opposite banks are are 30В° and 45В° respectively. If the width of the river is 50( + 1) metres, find the height of the 3 bridge above the riverbanks.
From the top of a 60 m tower, the angle of depression of two objects on the same side of the tower are 30В° and 45В°. Find the distance between the objects.
A flagpole has a shadow measuring 20 meters. Given that the height of the flagpole is 20 meters, 3 What is the angle at which the sun is elevated ?
Two observers stand 40 meters apart and observe the top of a tower. The angles of elevation are 30В°and 45В°. Find the height of the tower (assuming both observers are on the same side of the tower).
From a point on the ground, the angle of elevation of the top of a tower is 30В°. If the distance from the point to the base of the tower is 70 meters, find the height of the tower.
The angle of elevation of the top of a tower is 30В° from a point on the ground. On moving 200 m closer to the base, the angle becomes 60В°. Find the height of the tower.
The angle of elevation of the top of a tower from a point 120 m away from its base is 45В°. Find the height of the tower.
Two vertical poles have heights of 12 meters and 18 meters vertically on a plane ground. If the distance between their feet is 8m, the distance between their tops is:
Two points and are at рќ‘ѓ рќ‘„ distances and form the base of a рќ‘Ґ рќ‘¦ tower. The angles of elevation of the top of the tower from and are рќ‘ѓ рќ‘„ complementary. The height of the tower is:
The angle of elevation of the top of a tower from a point on the ground is 60В°. If the tower is 40 meters high, find 3 the distance of the point from the base of the tower.
A balloon reaches a vertical height of 90 m from the ground. The string attached to the balloon is inclined at 45В° to the horizontal. The length of the string is:
A vertical tower casts its gaze upwards from the ground. If you stand 15 meters from its base and look up at a 30-degree angle to its peak, how tall is the tower?
A student is standing, reading an article 28 meters away from his school building. If the angle of elevation of the top of the school building is 45 degrees, how tall is the school building ?

An airplane in level flight at an altitude of 3 km from the ground is observed at an angle of elevation of 60В°. After 20 seconds, its angle of elevation is observed to be 30В°. The speed of the airplane in km/hr is:

An aircraft is flying at a steady altitude of 1500 meters. From a point 3 on the ground, the angle of elevation of the airplane changes from 60В° to 30В° in 15 seconds as it flies directly away from the observer. What is the approximate speed of the airplane?

A hot-air balloon directly above point P is rising vertically at 4 m/s. An observer at point Q, 400 m due east of P, watches the balloon. At the moment when the angle of elevation is 45В°, how long until it reaches an angle of elevation of 60В°? (Assume no horizontal drift.)

From the summit of a 200 m high cliff, the angles of depression to two boats situated on the same side of the cliff are measured at 45В° and 60В° respectively. The boats are moving towards the cliff in a straight line. After 10 minutes, the angle of depression to the first boat becomes 60В°, while the angle to the second boat becomes 75В°. If both boats move at constant but different speeds, determine the initial distance between the two boats.

qText: From the top of a 180 m high cliff, an observer notices a car moving away from the base of the cliff. The angle of depression of the car changes from 60В° to 45В° in 15 seconds. What is the approximate speed of the car ?

A man on a lighthouse that stands 60 meters tall is observing a boat 3 moving away from it. Over the course of 15 seconds, the angle of depression to the boat shifts from 60В° to 30В°. What is speed of the boat?
A ladder leaning against a wall makes an angle with the horizontal О± 3 ground such that tan = . If the foot of О± 4 the ladder is 5 m away from the wall, what is the length (in m) of the ladder?
A pole 10 m long rests slantly against a vertical wall AB making an angle 30В° with the horizontal (ground). Find how far the foot of the pole is from the wall (in metres).

A mirror is placed on the ground facing upwards. A man sees the top of a tower in the mirror which is at a distance of 105 m from the mirror. The man is 0.5 m away from the mirror, and his height is 1.5 m. Find the height of the tower (in metres).
A vertical pole of length 6 m casts a 4 m long shadow on the ground. At the same time, a tower casts a 28 m long shadow. Find the height of the tower.

A pole stands vertically on the ground with the help of a 12-metre steel wire tied to its top and affixed on the ground. If the steel wire makes an angle of 30В° with the horizontal ground, then the height of the pole is equal to:

A man observed the top of an electric pole at angles of elevation of 60В° and 30В°, respectively, from two different observation points P and Q . If the distance between P and Q is 10 m, find the height of the pole (in m).
From the top of a tower, the angle of depression of the top of a 10 m high building is 60В°. If the distance between the tower and the building is m, 50 3 find the height of the tower.
A vertical pillar 42 cm long casts a 35 cm long shadow. At the same time, a tower casts a shadow 25 m long. Find the height of the tower.

Suhas, a 3.15 m tall tree, and a building are positioned such that their feet on the ground are collinear and the tree is located between Suhas and the building. The tree is located at a distance of 7.5 m from Suhas and at a distance of 45 m from the building. Further, the eyes of Suhas, the top of the tree, and the top of the building fall in one line, and the eyes of Suhas are at a height of 1.8 m from the ground. Find the height (in m) of the building.

Suhas, a tree, and an 11.25 m tall building are positioned such that their feet on the ground are collinear and the tree is located between Suhas and the building. The tree is located at a distance of 7.5 m from Suhas and at a distance of 45 m from the building. Further, the eyes of Suhas, the top of the tree, and the top of the building fall in one line, and the eyes of Suhas are at a height of 1.8 m from the ground. Find the height (in m) of the tree.

A person standing at a distance looks at a building having a height of 1000 metres. The angle between the top of the building and the ground is 30В°. At what approximate distance (in metres) is the person standing away from the building.
A vertical pole of 28m height casts a 19.2m long shadow. At the same time, find the length of the shadow cast by another pole of 52.5m height.
